---
title: "Course Summary: <course title>"
author: "<your name>"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

<!-- This is where you step back from the individual chapters and say what the whole course added up to for you, ending in a short abstract you could hand to someone outside the course. Your chapter summaries are the place to start. -->

## Looking back across the course

<!-- What stands out? The ideas, methods, or moments that mattered most to you. -->

## How it fits together

<!-- What chapter connections do you see? Has the way you see the subject changed from where you started? -->

## The abstract

<!-- In your own voice, what did you get out of this course? Write it for someone who wasn't here, in one paragraph. -->
